name: Betrayal to Exile
summary: On the eve of triumph the closest ally turns; stripped of all and cast out, the survivor swears to return.

beats.label: Trust established
beats.intent: an intimate bond is set up to be broken

beats.label: Betrayal sprung
beats.intent: the closest ally turns at the worst moment

beats.label: Fall and loss
beats.intent: the protagonist is stripped of all

beats.label: Exile with a vow
beats.intent: cast out, the survivor swears return

preconditions.text: the protagonist holds trust, standing, or power

effects.text: the protagonist is stripped of standing and cast out
a driving vow of vengeance is sworn

examples.text: On the eve of triumph the closest ally turns; stripped of all and cast out, the survivor swears return.

name: Three-Year Pact
summary: Given a span to grow strong or die, the outcast trains in obscurity through humiliation and a fortuitous turn, then returns to overturn the one who broke them.

beats.label: Humiliation
beats.intent: the outcast is broken and given a deadline

beats.label: Fortuitous encounter
beats.intent: a chance turn opens a path to power

beats.label: Bitter ascent
beats.intent: obscure, grinding growth

beats.label: Breakthrough
beats.intent: the protagonist crosses the threshold of strength

beats.label: Return and reversal
beats.intent: return to overturn the one who broke them

preconditions.text: the protagonist has been broken and humiliated
a finite window to grow strong is set

effects.text: the protagonist returns transformed and powerful
the one who broke them is overturned

examples.text: Given a span to grow strong or die, the outcast trains in obscurity and returns to overturn the one who broke them.

name: False Accusation
summary: Branded a traitor on planted proof, the accused endures public disgrace until the true hand is dragged into the light.

beats.label: Framed for a crime
beats.intent: planted proof brands the protagonist

beats.label: Condemned publicly
beats.intent: the protagonist is disgraced before all

beats.label: Evidence hidden
beats.intent: the truth is suppressed; the low ebb

beats.label: Truth unmasked
beats.intent: the true hand is dragged to light

preconditions.text: the protagonist can be plausibly blamed for a crime

examples.text: Branded a traitor on planted proof, the accused endures disgrace until the true hand is dragged to light.

name: Patient Infiltration
summary: Under a borrowed name the avenger climbs the enemy's own ranks, gathers leverage, then turns their secrets against them from within.

beats.label: Enter under a false name
beats.intent: infiltrate the enemy under cover

beats.label: Earn trust inside
beats.intent: climb the ranks of the enemy

beats.label: Gather leverage
beats.intent: quietly collect secrets and proof

beats.label: Strike from within
beats.intent: turn the enemy's secrets against them

preconditions.text: the protagonist can pass unrecognized into the enemy's circle

effects.text: the enemy is undone by its own secrets
the avenger's true identity is revealed at the strike

examples.text: Under a borrowed name the avenger climbs the enemy's own ranks, then turns their secrets against them.

name: Blood-Debt Collection
summary: One by one the avenger finds those who shared the crime, confronts each with proof, and makes them answer for it.

beats.label: Locate the guilty
beats.intent: find one who shared the crime

beats.label: Confront with proof
beats.intent: present undeniable proof

beats.label: Guilty pleads or defies
beats.intent: the guilty begs or stands defiant

beats.label: Exact the price
beats.intent: make them answer for it

preconditions.text: multiple parties share guilt for a past wrong

effects.text: one of the guilty is held to account
the chain of reckoning advances toward the prime mover

examples.text: One by one the avenger finds those who shared the crime and makes each answer for it.

name: Mercy or Vengeance
summary: With the killer helpless, a reason to spare appears; the avenger's choice reshapes who they become.

roles.label: the avenger at the brink
constraints: holds the power to end it

beats.label: Enemy at mercy
beats.intent: the killer lies helpless

beats.label: Reason to spare surfaces
beats.intent: a reason not to strike appears

beats.label: Choice forced
beats.intent: the avenger must decide

beats.label: Consequence lands
beats.intent: the choice reshapes who they are

preconditions.text: the protagonist has the enemy at their mercy

effects.text: the protagonist is changed by their choice
the cycle of vengeance is closed or perpetuated

examples.text: With the killer helpless, a reason to spare appears; the avenger's choice reshapes who they become.

name: Pyrrhic Victory
summary: The enemy falls at last, and in the silence after, the avenger sees what the years of hate have cost.

beats.label: Final confrontation
beats.intent: the last reckoning arrives

beats.label: Victory achieved
beats.intent: the enemy falls

beats.label: Hidden cost revealed
beats.intent: the price of the pursuit surfaces

beats.label: Hollow aftermath
beats.intent: the avenger reckons with the emptiness

preconditions.text: the protagonist nears the end of a long pursuit of vengeance

effects.text: the avenger confronts the cost of their vengeance

examples.text: The enemy falls at last — and in the silence after, the avenger sees what the years of hate have cost.

name: Usurped Inheritance
summary: A stolen birthright and a forged will leave the true heir a beggar, until the proof none could destroy resurfaces.

beats.label: Rightful claim stolen
beats.intent: the birthright is seized by forgery

beats.label: Cast out as a pretender
beats.intent: the true heir is disowned

beats.label: Proof of lineage sought
beats.intent: the heir hunts the proof that survives

beats.label: Claim reclaimed
beats.intent: the proof resurfaces and the claim is restored

preconditions.text: the protagonist holds a rightful claim that can be stolen

examples.text: A stolen birthright and a forged will leave the true heir a beggar — until the proof none could destroy resurfaces.
